stemHtml:
A pilot who is a moderate smoker, regularly complains that he/she can’t see ground features as well as other members on night flights above 5 000 ft. Which of the following can explain why the pilot takes longer than other crew members to adapt to night vision?

1. Inhaling carbon dioxide from smoking or exhaust fumes
2. Inhaling carbon monoxide from smoking or exhaust fumes
3. The onset of hypoxia as the aircraft climbs above 5000 ft
4. The onset of anoxia as the aircraft climbs above 5 000 ft
